skills.name: Installation and Setup
skills.desc: Learn how to download, install, and configure Hydra on your operating system for immediate use.

skills.name: Basic Command Structure
skills.desc: Master the core syntax and structure of Hydra commands to start running basic attacks.

skills.name: Password List Creation
skills.desc: Create a text file with a list of passwords that Hydra will use for brute force attempts.

skills.name: Username List Creation
skills.desc: Build a text file of usernames for Hydra to test during login attacks.

skills.name: Single Username Attack
skills.desc: Use Hydra to attack a target with one specified username and a list of passwords.

skills.name: Single Password Attack
skills.desc: Configure Hydra to test a single password against a list of usernames on a target.

skills.name: Target IP Specification
skills.desc: Define the IP address or hostname in Hydra to direct your brute force attack accurately.

skills.name: Target Service Selection
skills.desc: Select a specific service like SSH or FTP in Hydra to focus your attack efforts.

skills.name: SSH Brute Force
skills.desc: Use Hydra to perform a brute force attack on SSH credentials with username and password lists.

skills.name: FTP Brute Force
skills.desc: Attack FTP server logins with Hydra using a combination of usernames and passwords.

skills.name: HTTP Form Attack
skills.desc: Set up Hydra to brute force HTTP form-based logins on websites with custom parameters.

skills.name: Output File Saving
skills.desc: Save Hydra’s attack results to a file for analysis or future reference.

skills.name: Verbose Mode Usage
skills.desc: Enable Hydra’s verbose mode to display detailed output and track attack progress live.

skills.name: Task Limit Configuration
skills.desc: Adjust the number of parallel tasks in Hydra to optimize attack speed and resource usage.

skills.name: Timeout Adjustment
skills.desc: Modify Hydra’s timeout settings to control how long it waits for target responses.

skills.name: Custom Port Attack
skills.desc: Direct Hydra to attack a non-standard port by specifying it in the command.

skills.name: Multiple Targets Attack
skills.desc: Use Hydra to simultaneously brute force multiple IP addresses or hosts in one session.

skills.name: Login Success Detection
skills.desc: Learn how Hydra indicates a successful login and how to spot it in the output.

skills.name: Error Message Handling
skills.desc: Identify and address common error messages in Hydra to keep attacks running smoothly.

skills.name: Rate Limiting Control
skills.desc: Adjust Hydra’s attack speed to avoid triggering rate limits or detection mechanisms.

skills.name: Service-Specific Options
skills.desc: Apply Hydra’s service-specific flags (e.g., for SSH or HTTP) to tailor attacks effectively.

skills.name: Session Save and Restore
skills.desc: Save an ongoing Hydra session to a file and restore it later to resume the attack.

skills.name: Basic Troubleshooting
skills.desc: Resolve common Hydra issues like connection errors or invalid commands with simple fixes.
